description: IICP Intent URN Registry — authoritative list of defined intents. New intents require Protocol Steward sign-off.

intents.name: LLM Chat Completion
intents.description: Multi-turn chat completion using the messages array format (OpenAI-compatible).

intents.name: LLM Text Completion
intents.description: Single-turn text completion from a prompt string.

intents.name: Text Embedding
intents.description: Generate dense vector embedding(s) from input text.

intents.name: Code Lint and Analysis
intents.description: Static analysis and lint of code. Returns issues with severity and location.

intents.name: Code Optimization
intents.description: Suggest or apply optimizations to code.

intents.name: Research Summarization
intents.description: Summarize a long document or set of documents.

intents.name: Educational Tutoring
intents.description: Provide tutoring, explanation, or guided problem-solving on a topic.

intents.name: Text Translation
intents.description: Translate text from one natural language to another.

intents.name: Text Classification
intents.description: Classify text into one or more categories from a provided set.

intents.name: Multimodal Embedding
intents.description: Generate embeddings from mixed text and image inputs.

intents.name: MCP Tool Call
intents.description: Execute an MCP tool call via IICP transport. Formal binding spec: spec/iicp-mcp-binding.md (Phase 2).

intents.name: LLM Summarization
intents.description: Summarize a document or long text into a condensed form. Part of the Cooperative Inference Profile (Phase 5).

intents.name: LLM Classification
intents.description: Classify text using an LLM with optional chain-of-thought. Complements urn:iicp:intent:classify:v1 which is label-only. Part of the Cooperative Inference Profile (Phase 5).

intents.name: LLM Reranking
intents.description: Rerank a list of candidate passages or results by relevance to a query using an LLM or cross-encoder. Part of the Cooperative Inference Profile (Phase 5).
